utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections with details. Now, check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes address, type, bedrooms, size, price, school district, features, property taxes, and a viewing date — sufficiently detailed. 2) financing: contains mortgage amount, rate, monthly payment, down payment, fee, amortization, pre-approval validity, and status — fully specified with terms. 3) legal_services: firm, package, cost, and included services — complete with costs. 4) moving_services: package, cost, inclusions, timeline, and duration — complete with costs. 5) setup_services: package, setup and monthly costs, inclusions, timeline; also includes a survey with cost — sufficient. 6) total_budget: price, down payment, mortgage amount, total service costs, detailed breakdown, monthly ongoing costs, and available equity — complete cost breakdown. All 6 items are present and fully specified.
